cases.prompt: Use the persona-attack skill: attack this idea as The Economist — a $9/month meal-planning app for students.
Attack this as The Builder: an offline-first mobile CRM that syncs peer-to-peer without a server.
Roast this idea from every angle and give me a final verdict: an AI tutor for chess.
cases.notes: full council + verdict = roast, not one persona
